prompt: Create a photorealistic, cinematic street photograph of a traditional Japanese summer wind chime hanging in the open doorway of an old wooden shop or house. The small clear glass bell has blue floral decoration and a narrow rectangular paper strip dangling below it, printed with a blue ocean wave pattern. Behind it is a textured beige plaster wall framed by dark aged wood, with a black metal pendant lamp near the top right. Through the doorway on the left, show a softly blurred quiet Japanese lane with wooden buildings, green trees, bright daylight, and shallow depth of field. Overlay one huge bold white brush-calligraphy character across the center and lower half of the image, reading 风, partially surrounding the wind chime as if painted on glass; the strokes are thick, clean, and luminous white. Use natural summer light, realistic textures, muted warm tones, wide horizontal composition, documentary photography style, high detail, peaceful nostalgic atmosphere, no people, no extra text.
